purpose: Collect and summarize target-company product, price, delivery, seller, and platform-policy evidence.
primary_questions: Is Temu relying more on discounts, coupons, or seller-funded promotions?
Are delivery promises, stock availability, or visible product quality deteriorating?
Are seller terms, fees, return/refund rules, payout timing, penalties, or fulfillment obligations tightening?
Which product or policy changes need follow-up by the investment agent?

accepted_inputs.name: product_snapshots
required_for: snapshot-level price, coupon, delivery, stock, and rating summaries

accepted_inputs.name: weekly_product_metrics
required_for: trend-aware price, discount, coupon, delivery, stockout, and rating metrics

accepted_inputs.name: product_signal_pack
required_for: promotion, delivery, stockout, and rating product signals

accepted_inputs.name: merchant_policy_events
required_for: seller terms, platform policy, payout, returns, fees, penalties, and fulfillment events
